Description:
A colorful assortment of auspicious appetizers, traditionally eaten in the Far East during the Heavensturn holiday.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
  <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Spell Speed Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +4% (Max 10)
  <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>VIT Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +5% (Max 12)
  <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Gear Durability Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3
  <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3%
  <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
  (Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Oriental New Year's Meal

Description: A verdantly decorated pair of folding fans displayed at Heavensturn to beckon winds of fair fortune in the seasons to come.
Name: Springtide Fan Stand

Singular: 演技教本:ハートポーズ
Description:
振付師が記した演技教本
[使用すると特定のエモートを修得する]
An illustrated manual detailing how to secure the adoration of all who behold you. Use to learn the /loveheart emote.
Name: 演技教本:ハートポーズ
Ballroom Etiquette - Projecting Affection

Description:
Delightfully squidgy, and a veritable fountain of good fortune to boot.

Use item to acquire the Great White Tsuchinoko minion.
Name: The Great White Tsuchinoko

Description:
This freshwater eel is covered in a mucous membrane that makes it notoriously slippery to handle.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]
Name: Oily Ropefish

Description:
The faint glow of this spherical organism is said to have illuminated many a dark night in Tural.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]
Name: Yak Awak Core

Description:
This cephalopod is named for its abnormally thick, opaque ink.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]
Name: Inktopus

Description:
A more delicate freshwater sponge has yet to be discovered.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]
Name: Honeycomb Sponge

Description:
A bivalve mollusk with an intricate porous shell.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]
Name: Cenote Oyster

Description:
A king among driftdowns trout, and lord of the stagnant waters of the driftdowns.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

A veritable king among trout, and lord of the stagnant waters of the driftdowns.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

What it cannot smother, it nibbles. What it cannot nibble, it tickles.

Use item to acquire the wisp of Darkness minion.
Name: Wisp of Darkness

Description: Take to the skies on this piece of the battlefield created by the Cloud of Darkness, safe in the knowledge that it will not suddenly phase from existence.
Name: Dais of Darkness

Description: Envelop yourself in this sliver of the Cloud of Darkness's raiment, and know the feeling of being the dread voidsent queen. All-consuming powers of Darkness not included.
Name: Shroud of Darkness

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>Modern Aesthetics - A Half Times Two</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>Modern Aesthetics - A Half Times Two</Emphasis>
Description:
The realm's premier publication on beauty and fashion, this specific copy of <Emphasis>Modern Aesthetics</Emphasis> covers, in detail, techniques for taming tresses into two perfectly plaited halfbraids, replete with ribbons and all.

Use to unlock a new hairstyle at the aesthetician.
Name: Modern Aesthetics - A Half Times Two

Singular: セネシャルプリンス・ヘッドセット
Name: セネシャルプリンス・ヘッドセット
Seneschal Prince's Headset

Singular: セネシャルプリンス・ジャケット
Name: セネシャルプリンス・ジャケット
Seneschal Prince's Jacket

Singular: セネシャルプリンス・グローブ

Description:
A banded chest containing a complete set of Dawnblazer attire.

Required level: 1. IL: 1. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
Name: Dawnblazer Attire Coffer

Description: A single thick coat of this oil will greatly reduce friction between the many moving parts of a train.
Name: Locomotive Lubricant

Description: Packed with cushions, lighting fixtures, and other materials intended to enhance the train riding experience.
Name: Carriage Furnishing Supplies

Description: Once properly processed, this colorant is applied to a map to add depth and detail.
Name: Mapmaking Pigment

Description: The chemicals contained herein are used to create a powerful cleaning agent popular among locomotive engineers.
Name: Industrial Sanitizing Fluid

Description: An assortment of stone yet to be crushed into railroad ballast.
Name: Trackbed Repair Materials

Description: When used to polish the rails and castings, the subsequent reduction in friction offers a much quieter train ride.
Name: Rail Grindstone

Description: These luxurious cushioned seats offer superior comfort for train rides of any duration.
Name: Plush Carriage Seating

Description: Includes everything required to print painstakingly detailed maps, without which Tuliyollan citizens would surely struggle to navigate Vanguard.
Name: Map Printing Essentials

Description: These toolboxes hold a full set of supplies favored by the engineers of Xak Tural Railing.
Name: Engineer's Supply Kit

Description: Packed neatly with spikes, ties, and other sturdy components used to lay rail.
Name: Railroad Repair Kit

Description: This heavy sack holds everything needed to assemble a grindstone that will polish your rails to silent perfection.
Name: Rail Grindstone Components

Description: Contains just enough fabric and cushioning to build a single row of comfortable, durable train seats. Instructions not included.
Name: Carriage Seat Components

Description: An assortment of raw materials needed to create paper and ink for use in printing.
Name: Map Printing Components

Singular: set of engineer's supply kit components
Plural: sets of engineer's supply kit components
Description: Used in the construction of various implements a locomotive engineer may need on the job.
Name: Engineer's Supply Kit Components

Singular: box of railroad repair kit components
Plural: boxes of railroad repair kit components
Description: Once the included steel has been used to construct spikes and joints, the wooden box may be repurposed into ties for maximum efficiency.
Name: Railroad Repair Kit Components

Description: A crystallized mass of residual spiritbond energies transferred to an article of weaponry or armor by the Cloud of Darkness during its creation.
Name: Clouddark Demimateria I

Description: A crystallized mass of residual spiritbond energies transferred to an article of weaponry or armor by the Cloud of Darkness during its creation.
Name: Clouddark Demimateria II

Description: Recovered from the Skydeep Cenote's innermost chamber, this lamp gives any room an ethereal purple tinge.
Name: Skydeep Lamp

Description: A spacious work desk taken from a storage room in the soul processing division. Additional monitors not included.
Name: Origenics Monitor Desk

Description: This office chair was designed to facilitate hours of soul-sucking work.
Name: Origenics Chair

Description: The eerie glow of this three-light fixture brings to mind a haunted mansion.
Name: Strayborough Wall Lamp

Description: This whimsical floor stencil depicts a decidedly cuter interpretation of the Lord of Nightmares.
Name: Traumerei Floor Stencil

Description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the dragoon.
Name: Dragoon Display Crystal

Description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the paladin.
Name: Paladin Display Crystal

Description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the warrior.
Name: Warrior Display Crystal

Description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the monk.
Name: Monk Display Crystal

Description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the ninja.
Name: Ninja Display Crystal

Description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the bard.
Name: Bard Display Crystal

Description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the black mage.
Name: Black Mage Display Crystal

Description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the summoner.
Name: Summoner Display Crystal

Description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the white mage.
Name: White Mage Display Crystal

Description: Designed for those who take great pride in their work, this purely decorative crystal bespeaks enthusiastic commitment to the path of the scholar.
Name: Scholar Display Crystal

Description: As formidable as it looks, it's merely a lawn decoration─but your neighbors don't need to know that.
Name: Electrope Turret

Description: Recovered from Xak Turali ruins, this statue depicts an urn containing a serpentine entity of diminutive size.
Name: Lesser Pillar of Tural

Description:
You don't know the name of these grotto flowers, but looking at them makes you feel a bit drowsie.

※Up to ten flower plots may be placed in a single garden, regardless of type.
Name: Ihuykatumu Flower Plot

Description: Since olden times, this lantern has illuminated the rocky mountain path at the Summit of Zor─but no more.
Name: Zormor Stone Lantern

Description: Add intrigue to your abode with a little piece of the Wachumeqimeqi Appreciation Sale.
Name: Wachumeqimeqi Balloon

Description:
A tenebrous chest containing a piece of clouddark attire.

Required level: 100. IL: 730. Head gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
Name: Clouddark Head Gear Coffer (IL 730)

Description:
A tenebrous chest containing a piece of clouddark attire.

Required level: 100. IL: 730. Chest gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
Name: Clouddark Chest Gear Coffer (IL 730)

Description:
A tenebrous chest containing a piece of clouddark attire.

Required level: 100. IL: 730. Hand gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
Name: Clouddark Hand Gear Coffer (IL 730)

Description:
A tenebrous chest containing a piece of clouddark attire.

Required level: 100. IL: 730. Leg gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
Name: Clouddark Leg Gear Coffer (IL 730)

Description:
A tenebrous chest containing a piece of clouddark attire.

Required level: 100. IL: 730. Foot gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
Name: Clouddark Foot Gear Coffer (IL 730)
